description: Config file for the Checkov IaC scanner (.checkov.yaml / .checkov.yml). Keys mirror the long-form CLI flags documented at https://www.checkov.io/2.Basics/CLI%20Command%20Reference.html; Checkov has no official schema of its own (see bridgecrewio/checkov#6086), so this only covers the commonly used subset and accepts unknown keys.

check.description: Only run these checks (by ID, BC ID, or severity); everything else is skipped

directory.description: IaC root directory to scan (mutually exclusive with `file`)

file.description: Specific file(s) to scan (mutually exclusive with `directory`)

framework.description: Only run checks for these frameworks (e.g. terraform, dockerfile, kubernetes)

skip-check.description: Skip these checks (by ID, BC ID, severity, or secret status)

skip-path.description: Paths to skip, evaluated as regular expressions

title: Checkov configuration file
